node ./packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/eval.js '(() => { const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='/package/']")); const out = []; const seen = new Set(); for (const a of links) { const href = a.href; const text = a.textContent.trim(); if (!href || !text) continue; if (seen.has(href+"|"+text)) continue; seen.add(href+"|"+text); out.push({ text, href }); if (out.length >= 120) break; } return out; })()'

node ./packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/eval.js '(() => { const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[href*=\"/package/\"]")); const out = []; const seen = new Set(); for (const a of links) { const href = a.href; const text = a.textContent.trim(); if (!href || !text) continue; const key = href + "|" + text; if (seen.has(key)) continue; seen.add(key); out.push({ text, href }); if (out.length >= 120) break; } return out; })()'

node ./packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/eval.js '(() => { const depH2 = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("h2")).find(h => /^Dependencies\b/i.test(h.textContent.trim())); if (!depH2) return [{error:"Dependencies section not found"}]; const deps = []; const seen = new Set(); let el = depH2.nextElementSibling; while (el && el.tagName !== "H2") { for (const a of el.querySelectorAll("a[href*=\"/package/\"]")) { const name = a.textContent.trim(); const href = a.href; if (!name || !href || seen.has(name)) continue; seen.add(name); deps.push({ name, href }); if (deps.length >= 5) return deps; } el = el.nextElementSibling; } return deps; })()'
